dependencies_added.rationale: established DI pattern from issue #18/#20; no runtime coupling
reuse shared helper (F1 closure precedent) instead of duplicating regex

downstream_consumers_not_yet_built: agents/query/topic_selector.py (LLD scaffold only, not in this issue)
agents/query/synthesizer.py (LLD scaffold only, not in this issue)
risk_notes: Contract shape and query_type taxonomy are being authored now (not pre-specified in an LLD doc); chosen to align with 4.3.2's own hint (factual_lookup vs. broad_exploratory) so 4.3.2 doesn't need a breaking contract change. Disclosed as a design choice, not a hidden assumption.

No changes to any existing file; purely additive, so no regression risk to ingestion/llm suites beyond the new cross-package import of ingestion._json_fences (read-only import, no ingestion behavior change).

test_impact.targeted: cd agents && python3 -m pytest query/ llm/ -q
test_impact.full_regression: cd agents && python3 -m pytest . -q (known pre-existing collection error in ingestion/test_e2e_smoke.py, protobuf/issue #46, out of scope)
